transcript.content: [GC-D2] 回到编辑器问题。我现在默认编辑器是什么？

接下来 我要做蛇呢么？

接下来做这 3 件事就够了。 1. 先留一条最小回归命令 直接用这条做以后 spot check： ```bash npm run codex:vscode:gc --silent ``` 如果怀疑 prompt 没及时落盘，再用： ```bash node scripts/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js --format markdown --prompt "[GC-D2] 回到编辑器问题。…
或者补一个 repo 内可重复的 smoke/eval case，把 GC-D2 收进固定回归

decision.archive_summary: Earlier detour about the default editor being Zed is resolved. A reusable spot-check command was established (`npm run codex:vscode:gc --silent`, with the prompt-form rerun variant if needed). The active work then moved to adding a repeatable repo-local smoke/eval case for GC-D2; the assistant reported it was added under `evals/codex-context-minor-gc-live-cases.js` and later said the suite is green after allowing guarded relation `continue` and adding the live eval case.
decision.reasoning_summary: The latest user turn is a terse follow-up on the same GC/editor regression thread, so this stays `continue`. Raw context should keep the immediately relevant regression/eval exchange (`t9`-`t12` except the latest user turn, which runtime keeps automatically). Older editor-status and generic next-step/spot-check discussion is resolved or now better preserved as compact pins rather than raw turns. Pins keep the durable command and the recorded regression-fix outcome without carrying the full older block.
